Metadata.homeDescription: Custom hand-painted oil portraits of dogs and cats from your pet photo. Preview with AI, order with confidence.
Metadata.signInDescription: Sign in to create your custom pet portrait preview at {siteName}.

hero.title: Your pet, painted like a <emphasis>masterpiece</emphasis>
hero.description: Upload a cherished photo, preview your portrait in our studio, refine every detail in conversation, and receive a hand-painted oil artwork made just for them.

slider.hint: Drag the handle to watch the photo become a painting
slider.aria: Compare the original photo with the painted portrait

hero.altPrimary: Border collie portrait, photo and painted versions
hero.altSecondary: Cat portrait in a walnut frame

1.title: Upload & tell their story
1.copy: Sign in, share a clear photo, and choose style, background, size, and finish.

2.title: Preview in the studio
2.copy: Generate AI portrait previews and refine the direction with natural conversation.

3.title: Painted with care
3.copy: Your artist works from your photo and chosen preview. Checkout is seamless via Shopify.

gallery.title: Four directions, one beloved subject
gallery.description: Each preset sets a distinct mood — from warm vintage glow to crisp modern realism — while preserving your pet's unique character.

testimonials.title: Hung with pride, loved for years

t1.quote: We hung Bailey's portrait above the fireplace — guests always ask if it's an old family painting. It captures her exactly.
t1.author: Sarah M.

t2.quote: The preview made it easy to trust the process — the finished painting of Piksel is even better than what we imagined.
t2.author: Marta & Tomek
t2.detail: Pug portrait · a gift for grandma

t3.quote: It arrived beautifully packed with a handwritten note. Our cat Mochi looks like nobility — because she is.
t3.author: Daniel R.

faq.title: Thoughtful answers, no surprises
faq.description: Custom artwork is personal. Here's what to expect from preview to delivery.

preview.q: Are AI previews the final artwork?
preview.a: No. Previews help you explore direction and communicate with your artist. The finished piece is hand-painted with traditional oils on canvas.

photo.a: Choose a sharp, well-lit image where your pet's face, markings, and expression are clearly visible. Natural daylight is ideal.

revise.q: Can I revise the preview before ordering?
revise.a: Absolutely. Use quick suggestions or describe changes in your own words — warmer tones, softer fur, a cream background — until it feels right.

afterOrder.a: Your order includes the original photo, selected preview, pet details, and notes — everything needed to paint your portrait with care.

cta.title: They deserve a place on your wall
cta.description: Open the studio, upload a photo, and see your pet transformed in minutes. Your hand-painted portrait follows when you're ready.
cta.note: AI preview included with every order — we only paint once you approve the direction.
cta.frameAlt: Framed oil portrait of a smiling dog

Footer.tagline: Every companion deserves to be remembered like a masterpiece.
Footer.description: Hand-painted oil portraits of the companions who make a house feel like home. Preview with AI, painted with heart.

SignIn.heroTitle: Step into your private portrait studio
SignIn.title: Sign in to continue
SignIn.description: Save your preview session, generate portrait directions, and add your custom order to cart when you're ready.
SignIn.privacy: By continuing, you agree to our use of uploaded pet photos for preview generation and order fulfillment.

Product.devNoticeBody: Shopify is not configured yet, so this page uses a local mock product. Add your store credentials to .env.local and seed the product from docs/shopify-seed.md before checkout will work.

PortraitStudio.disclaimer: AI previews are approximate references for your hand-painted oil portrait. Final artwork is crafted by an artist using your photo and selected preview.
PortraitStudio.photoStatusMissing: First, place a photo on the easel
PortraitStudio.startOverConfirm: Start from the beginning? Your photo, previews, and choices will be cleared.
PortraitStudio.refineHint: Tap a suggestion or describe a change in your own words — the studio repaints in moments.
PortraitStudio.versionsCount: {count, plural, one {# version painted} other {# versions painted}}

stage.dropTitle: Place their photo on the easel
stage.dropHint: Drag & drop or browse — a sharp, well-lit photo works best (JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC)
stage.dropActive: Let go — the easel is ready
stage.readyHint: Beautiful. Now choose a style on the right and let the studio paint.
stage.signedOutHint: Sign in to place their photo and watch the portrait appear.

lines.s5: Catching the light in their eyes

compare.aria: Compare your photo with the painted preview
